prompt: Should Reveal charge for community access in v1?
method: constitution-bound live-chat simulation (same Nexus packs/contracts/DNA weighting; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)
reply:
Recommendation for v1: do not enforce paid access, but model entitlements now.

- Add entitlements table / flags so a free→paid migration doesn’t rewrite the feed.
- Authz check points in APIs return allow-all in v1.
- Instrument join/activation events so a later pricing decision is data-backed.
- Migration plan: grant `community_home` to all existing members if pricing turns on.

Engineering cost of a paywall is low; retrofit debt is high if we skip the model. Enforcement stays out of this ship slice.
